confidence_rubric.note: Confidence is computed from evidence, not assigned by feel. Score = sum of component scores, capped at 10.
confidence_rubric.note2: A hypothesis with N=6, 65% consistency, avg/stdev=0.4, no literature = 1+1+1+0 = 3. This is low confidence and correctly so.

confidence_calibration.note: Tracks whether confidence scores predict accuracy. Updated during self-reviews.

methodology_changelog.changes: Initial methodology. All defaults are starting assumptions — no data yet to calibrate against.

Added: min_abnormal_return_pct (1.5%), min_p_value (0.05), confidence rubric (formula-based), survivorship/selection bias tracking, knowledge revalidation decay (12 months), magnitude-aware accuracy in self-review.
methodology_changelog.reason: Methodology audit — statistical rigor and measurability gaps
